answer: Northstar Outfitters' net margin dropped on June 12, 2026 because the pricing shadow ledger duplicated promotional adjustments after joining by `sku` instead of `order_line_id` during rollout `ff-2026-06-pricing-shadow-ledger`. The remediation was to roll back the feature flag and rebuild `margin_daily` from `order_line_id`-deduplicated order line ledger rows.

facts.root_cause: pricing shadow ledger duplicated promotional adjustments
facts.remediation: roll back the feature flag and rebuild margin_daily from order_line_id
